news.headline: ASP Isotopes Inc. will host Investor Access Event in South Africa from January 14-16, 2025. NASDAQ: ASPI.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, ASP Isotopes Inc. revealed plans to host an Investor Access Event in South Africa scheduled for January 14-16, 2025. This event aims to showcase the company's advancements in isotope production technology across various industries. ASP Isotopes Inc., listed as NASDAQ: ASPI, focuses on developing innovative processes for isotope manufacturing. The event in South Africa signifies a strategic move by the company to engage with potential investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Shopify's Black Friday e-commerce volume surged 22% to $5 billion, matching previous year's growth.
news.summary: On Black Friday, Shopify saw a surge in gross merchandise volume, hitting $5 billion, showcasing a 22% increase compared to the previous year. This rise in e-commerce activity matched the growth seen in the prior year. The significant numbers reflect the continued strength and popularity of online shopping, especially during major sales events like Black Friday.

news.headline: Palantir stock surges 290% in 2024 post-Trump win. Investors ponder buy or sell stance for 2025.
news.summary: In 2024, Palantir's stock saw a significant increase of 290%, primarily boosted following Trump's election victory. This surge was predominantly due to expectations regarding defense budget allocations and advancements in AI automation. Termed as the 'Trump Trade', this rally raised questions on whether Palantir's shares are a viable investment option as we approach 2025.

news.headline: Cybersecurity stocks like Fortinet (+62%), CrowdStrike (+35%), and Palo Alto (+31%) show growth potential. Earnings report awaited.
news.summary: In a recent ranking of 197 IBD industry groups, cybersecurity stocks were placed at No. 77. Fortinet stock has experienced a notable increase of 62% in 2024, while CrowdStrike has seen a rise of 35%, and Palo Alto 31%. Some cybersecurity stocks to keep an eye on with upcoming earnings include Zscaler, Okta, and SentinelOne.

news.headline: AT&T expected to announce stock buyback at investor day, analysts anticipate, happening on Tuesday.
news.summary: On Tuesday, AT&T is scheduled to hold an investors day where industry analysts predict the telecom company will reveal plans for an AT&T stock buyback. Wall Street is anticipating this move from the giant telecom corporation.

news.headline: Salesforce to report Q3 earnings; focus on fiscal 2026 guidance. AI agent impact on margin improvement.
news.summary: During the upcoming quarter, analysts anticipate that enterprise software company Salesforce will release its Q3 earnings report. They will particularly focus on the preliminary fiscal 2026 guidance for Salesforce stock. Investors are concerned about the potential impact of the AI agent push on margin improvement in the coming year.

news.headline: Nvidia stock gained 175% in 2024 before split. Arista, Palo Alto to join stock splits in 2024 with other tech companies.
news.summary: Nvidia's stocks have shown significant growth in 2024, with an increase of 175%; however, the majority of this growth occurred prior to its June stock split. Looking ahead, Arista Networks and Palo Alto are set to undergo stock splits soon, following in the footsteps of other companies like Nvidia, Broadcom, and Super Micro in the same year. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Tech stocks may have a 'Santa Rally' to end 2024, with Google stock being questioned if it's a buy or sell amid a slow performance compared to the 'Magnificent 7', emphasizing on the possible rally they may see before the year ends.
news.summary: Google’s stock performance in 2024 has been lagging behind the other top technology companies known as the ‘Magnificent 7’. Analysts are now looking towards a potential "Santa Rally" to boost the stock’s finish by the end of the year. Speculation surrounds whether this rally will benefit Google's stock. For more insights on whether Google's stock is a buy or sell, investors can refer to a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Forum Partners and TSCG launch private credit fund aiming for $25 million, offering 9% preferred return.
news.summary: In Palm Beach, Florida on December 2, 2024, Forum Partners, a renowned real estate investment and asset management company, along with its subsidiary TSCG, introduced TSCG Credit Opportunities I, LLC. This private credit fund aims to secure investments totaling $25 million from various sources.

news.headline: New Kickstarter project features Dancing Stickman Flipbook Playing Cards with 54 games, lighting up the platform.
news.summary: In London on December 2, 2024, an innovative Kickstarter project has transformed the traditional deck of cards into an extraordinary creation known as the Dancing Stickman Flipbook Playing Cards. This unique deck offers 54 games and interactive features, providing a magical experience for users. With this new development, playing cards have been elevated to a whole new level of entertainment.

news.headline: IFFGD acknowledges December as Constipation Awareness Month, aims to empower individuals struggling with constipation; affects millions worldwide.
news.summary: The International Foundation for Gastrointestinal Disorders (IFFGD) has designated December as Constipation Awareness Month. This common condition impacts millions globally but is often overlooked in health discussions. With the aim to raise awareness, the IFFGD highlights the importance of addressing constipation in the general population.

news.headline: Antique fishing lure collection by Wayne Edens to be auctioned on Dec. 9, includes rare items like one of eight frogs carved in 1898 by James Heddon.
news.summary: Rare antique fishing lures, some still in their original boxes, are set to spark excitement among collectors. One standout piece is a hand-carved frog created in 1898 by James Heddon, one of only eight in existence. This valuable piece was once showcased at the Heddon factory in Dowagiac, Michigan. The highly sought-after lures will be the focus of attention for fishing enthusiasts across the country.

news.headline: OSHA expands use of Vuzix M400 Smart Glasses by announcing a partnership with Vuzix.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Rochester, New York, Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a prominent provider of smart glasses and Augmented Reality (AR) solutions, revealed that it has secured a contract with the U.S. Department of Labor's Occupational Safety and Health division. Vuzix offers cutting-edge technology and products in this field, demonstrating its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Royal Canin donates to VCA Charities, reaffirming commitment to pet nutrition education for veterinary professionals.
news.summary: To commemorate Giving Tuesday, the specialized nutrition company is highlighting its unwavering dedication to supporting the continuous learning of veterinary professionals in ST. CHARLES, Mo., as of December 2, 2024. Royal Canin, a top player in pet health nutrition with revenues exceeding a billion dollars...

news.headline: Amentum names Darren Burton as Chief People Officer to lead talent strategy for 53,000 employees worldwide.
news.summary: Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) has appointed Darren Burton as Chief People Officer, with immediate effect. Burton will oversee the company's talent strategy and management for its diverse global workforce. Amentum, a global leader in engineering and technology solutions, operates in around 80 countries across all continents with 53,000 employees. The company serves the United States, the U.K., and other allied nations.

news.headline: IXL Diagnostic approved by VA Dept of Ed as alternative assessment for students in grades 3-8, used by 16M students.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California on December 2, 2024, the IXL Diagnostic was revealed as a tool for evaluating progress in students ranging from grades 3 to 8. This assessment can be employed at the start and middle of the academic year. IXL, the renowned personalized learning platform, which is accessed by a staggering 16 million students, introduced this offering. This news was shared in a press release by PRNewswire.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer names Sir Chris Wormald as new cabinet secretary and head of the civil service.
Spectral Capital adds James M. Babcock, a venture capitalist, to its advisory board for Quantum as a Service computing.
news.summary: In Seattle on December 2, 2024, Spectral Capital Corporation, a leading company in Quantum as a Service (QaaS) computing and decentralized cloud infrastructure, revealed the addition of James M. Babcock to its advisory board. Babcock, a Harvard Law School alum, brings valuable expertise to the team. Spectral Capital Corporation is traded on the OTCQB under the symbol FCCN.

news.headline: OpenGate Capital's S&G sells Premier Steel Doors and Frames to ASSA ABLOY, a global leader.
news.summary: Private equity firm OpenGate Capital recently revealed the sale of their portfolio company Sargent and Greenleaf's subsidiary, Premier Steel Doors and Frames, to ASSA ABLOY. Premier is a US-based manufacturer specializing in hollow metal doors and frames, metal building door systems, and aluminum windows. ASSA ABLOY is a prominent global company in access solutions, known for its expertise in efficient door openings and trusted identities. This transaction marks a significant move for both companies in the industry.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust provides $42M bridge loan to Shore to Shore Properties to refinance student housing property near University of Mississippi.
news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust, based in Newton, Massachusetts, has recently disclosed that they will be providing Shore to Shore Properties, Inc. with a substantial $42 million loan. This loan is intended to facilitate the refinancing of The Domain at Oxford, a prominent property. The transaction involves significant financial investment and marks a strategic move by both parties involved.

news.headline: Bitcoin Well plans to sell up to $2M in convertible debenture units with $500K insider participation, led by Haywood Securities Inc.
news.summary: A recent study found that the global unemployment rate has risen to 6.5%, affecting approximately 200 million people worldwide. The report also highlights a 1.4% drop in global GDP growth, representing a loss of $2.7 trillion in income. Moreover, it reveals that youth unemployment has reached 13.6%, with young women being disproportionately affected. The study suggests that immediate action is needed to address the economic impacts of the ongoing global crisis.

news.headline: Psychemedics Corporation announces a 1-for-5,000 reverse stock split followed by a 5,000-for-1 forward stock split on Dec. 3, 2024, for trading on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Psychemedics Corporation (Nasdaq: PMD), a leading provider of drug abuse hair testing, has announced a significant stock split. The Company's Board of Directors approved a 1-for-5,000 reverse stock split at the recent Annual Meeting of Stockholders. This will be followed by a 5,000-for-1 forward stock split, making up the Stock Split. These changes will take effect on December 3, 2024. Post-forward split, the stock will still trade on Nasdaq under the symbol "PMD".

news.headline: VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE:VERS) to release year-end update on milestone results in research and product development.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 2, 2024, VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE: VERS) (OTCQB: VRSSF), a cognitive computing firm focusing on advanced intelligent systems, disclosed a year-end update showcasing noteworthy achievements in research and product development.

news.headline: Brennan's Opportunity Fund purchased 225,000 SF asset, adding to 12M SF portfolio in the I-55 corridor.
news.summary: In September 2024, a new fund was introduced with the aim of acquiring surplus industrial real estate from non-professional and corporate proprietors. As part of this initiative, 225,000 square feet of property in the I-55 corridor were added to Brennan's extensive Chicagoland portfolio, which now boasts a total of 12 million square feet. This development took place in Rosemont, Illinois, and was officially announced on December 2, 2024.

news.headline: Impact of French political instability on finance markets: uncertain times ahead for investors.
Northstar signs LOI for long-term lease in Hamilton, Ontario with Great Lakes Port Management Inc, announced on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC and Calgary, AB as of December 2, 2024, Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. (TSXV: ROOF) (OTCQB: ROOOF) has disclosed a significant development. The Company has recently entered into a non-binding letter of intent (LOI) with Great Lakes Port Management Inc. ("GLPM"). This move is set to pave the way for potential collaborations and business ventures between the two entities. This partnership marks a strategic step for Northstar, presenting new opportunities for growth and expansion.

news.headline: Nebius raises $700M in private placement financing from investors like Accel, NVIDIA, Orbis to boost AI infrastructure.
news.summary: An AI infrastructure company, Nebius Group N.V. disclosed entering definitive agreements for a private placement financing round of USD 700 million from various institutional and accredited investors, such as Accel, NVIDIA, and accounts managed by Orbis Investments. The investment aims to bolster Nebius' existing plans for expansion.

news.headline: Safe Pro's Airborne Response meets contract milestones with a Florida Police Dept. for Drone services. (Word count: 13)
news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI) revealed that its Airborne Response division achieved various milestones for implementing a Drone-as-a-First-Responder (DFR) solution across multiple sites as part of a contract with a Florida municipal police department. The company, known for providing crucial aerial and AI solutions, is making significant progress in this multiphase project. The initiative involves training law enforcement personnel on the new technology.

news.headline: Hologic's AI breast imaging solution shows consistent performance across diverse populations - research findings.
news.summary: Hologic, based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, recently shared new findings indicating that their breast imaging AI solution delivers consistent performance across various demographic groups. The study showcased how their AI technology remains effective regardless of differences in populations. The research underscores the solution's reliability and accuracy in providing breast imaging services.

news.headline: Cooler Master offers Cyber Monday deals on gaming mice & PC hardware, discounts on products like MM310.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, technology company Cooler Master revealed its Cyber Monday sale, showcasing significant discounts on a wide range of products including gaming mice, cooling solutions, cases, and accessories. With an emphasis on enhancing setups for gamers and PC builders, the event offers attractive deals on Cooler Master's renowned products. Specific Cyber Monday Featured Deals include the MM310 gaming mouse, among others, presenting a valuable opportunity for tech enthusiasts to acquire premium equipment at unmatched prices.

news.headline: Litecoin price up 20% in 24 hrs on ETF news and altcoin optimism, now at $121.50 with $9.14B market cap.
news.summary: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) has seen a significant 20% surge in its price, currently standing at $121.50 with a market cap of $9.14 billion. This substantial increase comes amid speculation of its inclusion in a crypto index ETF and a general positive sentiment in the altcoin market. XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has also experienced a notable rise, with a price of $2.39 and a market cap of $135.8 billion, showing a 24.7% increase in the last 24 hours and a 61.7% surge over the past week. Additionally, Hedera (CRYPTO: HBAR) has seen a 23% rise with a price of $0.2374 and a market cap of $9.25 billion, marking a significant 68.5% increase in the last seven days. Crypto analyst CryptoBullet pointed out Litecoin's potential breakout, targeting the $233-$280 range, while seasoned trader Peter Brandt speculated on whether Litecoin could replicate XRP's recent performance.

news.headline: FDA grants Fast Track designation to Rigel's R289 for Lower-Risk MDS. Company focused on hematologic disorders and cancer.
news.summary: A biotechnology company based in South San Francisco, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: RIGL), specializing in hematologic disorders and cancer treatments, revealed on December 2, 2024, that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given Fast Track designation to their latest development.

news.headline: Monarch Private Capital aids SC economic growth with tax credit investments as SC's population increased by 1.7% in 2022-2023.
news.summary: Monarch Private Capital is backing South Carolina's vigorous economic expansion, as per U.S. Census Bureau figures showing a remarkable 1.7% increase in the state's population from July 2022 to July 2023. This surge positions South Carolina as the fastest-growing state in the nation during that timeframe. The state's attractiveness has been significantly boosted by various incentives, including tax credits, drawing in both companies and individuals looking to relocate. One notable program contributing to this growth is the South Carolina Historic Credit.

news.headline: Biden pardons Hunter in surprising move, latest developments on 02/12/24. #news
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.7%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The number of new jobs created also exceeded expectations, with a total of 250,000 jobs added to the economy. These positive figures have led to a boost in consumer confidence and are seen as a sign of a strong and growing economy. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw an increase of 3.2%, providing further evidence of economic prosperity. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, providing hope for continued growth and stability in the job market.

news.headline: Cinemark breaks all-time domestic records during Thanksgiving with the help of diverse movie selection, featuring high box office and food/beverage sales. #Cinemark #CNK
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Cinemark Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CNK), a major theatrical exhibition company globally, shared achieving numerous domestic records during Thanksgiving. They excelled in box office, premium formats, and food/beverage sales due to a varied movie lineup catering to diverse preferences. The success was marked by remarkable numbers, showcasing the company's impactful market presence in immersive auditoriums. This diverse film selection boosted Cinemark's performance, leading to unprecedented achievements during the holiday period.

news.headline: Kohl's to pay for customers' holiday gifts through Giveaway Saturday events; shoppers' carts covered each Saturday in December. #KSS #holidaycheer
news.summary: Kohl's (NYSE: KSS) in Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin, announced the introduction of Giveaway Saturday events to spread holiday joy. Customers at stores across the nation have the opportunity to have their entire cart paid for during December*. Starting on December 7 and running every Saturday until Christmas, these events offer additional savings for Kohl's shoppers on their holiday purchases. By surprising customers with free purchases, Kohl's aims to enhance the festive season experience for all.

news.headline: Cookies brand partners with Klutch Cannabis in Ohio to offer products in adult-use market from January 2025, including flower, vape, edibles, concentrates.
news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between the renowned cannabis and lifestyle company, Cookies, and Ohio's Klutch Cannabis to introduce Cookies' premium cannabis products to Ohio's recently opened adult-use market. Beginning in January 2025, Klutch Cannabis stores will showcase Cookies' popular flower and vape items, with edibles and concentrates expected to be added to the selection later in the same year. This partnership signifies a significant growth opportunity for both companies and highlights Cookies' commitment to entering new markets.

news.headline: Ashley Flowers and Brit Prawat of Crime Junkie take #1 podcast on 18-city tour across US.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on December 2, 2024, popular podcast hosts Ashley Flowers and Brit Prawat announced their plans to tour with their successful true crime podcast. Crime Junkie, the #1 podcast in the genre, will be presented live in 18 cities across the United States.

news.headline: MetaVia Inc. (Nasdaq: MTVA) to present at Emerging Growth Conference in December. CEO Hyung Heon Kim and CFO Marshall H. Woodworth to attend.
news.summary: A clinical-stage biotechnology company, MetaVia Inc. (Nasdaq: MTVA), based in Cambridge, Mass., made a significant announcement on Dec. 2, 2024. The company, specializing in transforming cardiometabolic diseases, revealed that Hyung Heon Kim, the current President and Chief Executive Officer, alongside Marshall H. Woodworth, the Chief Financial Officer, shared important updates.

news.headline: RPM relocates to Birmingham, enhancing growth & innovation in automotive logistics industry.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, RPM, a global logistics and supply-chain-solutions firm specializing in simplifying operations in the automotive transport sector, revealed its relocation to a new office in Birmingham, Michigan. The company's move signifies a strategic decision to enhance its operations and presence in the region, demonstrating its commitment to growth and development.

news.headline: Peet's Coffee offers free festive mocktails & limited-edition holiday cards; customers can sip new mocktails & write postcards by artist Lisa Congdon.
news.summary: Peet's Coffee is offering customers a special opportunity this holiday season in Emeryville, California. Customers can enjoy complimentary new mocktails while also writing holiday postcards designed by artist Lisa Congdon to send to loved ones. This unique experience allows customers to sip on mocktails and share warm wishes with their friends and family in a festive setting. This initiative is set to launch on December 2, 2024, for a limited time. Visit Peet's Coffee in Emeryville to be a part of this holiday tradition.

news.headline: Stellantis and Samsung secured $7B loan for battery factories in Indiana, aiming to produce electric-car batteries amid political scrutiny.
news.summary: A loan provided by the current administration, totaling a significant amount, aims to resist opposition from the Republican party. This funding will be utilized for the production of electric vehicle batteries in the state of Indiana.

news.headline: Polyrizon partners with EU GMP facility for manufacturing PL-14 allergy blocker in prep for 2025 trial, facilitating future commercialization.
news.summary: An agreement with a GMP manufacturing facility based in the EU will facilitate the prompt preparation for a clinical trial. This facility possesses extensive commercial production resources, which will aid Polyrizon in future commercialization endeavors.

news.headline: Mark Longley appointed as CEO of Vantage Point Logistics; Eric McGlade becomes Chairman of the Board.
news.summary: Mark Longley has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of Vantage Point Logistics (VPL) based in Westerville, Ohio. This announcement was made recently by the company. VPL is a key player in the healthcare logistics industry.

news.headline: PetPace and TelmyVet partner for Canadian pet care with AI tech health monitoring collar, telemedicine.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, PetPace®, a top provider of advanced pet wearable tech worldwide that utilizes AI and machine learning, has unveiled an exciting partnership with TelmyVet, a leading telemedicine solutions provider for veterinary practices. Through this collaboration, Canadian pet owners and veterinarians will gain access to cutting-edge health monitoring and analytics tools for pets. This innovative alliance brings near real-time insights to the pet health realm, enhancing the care and well-being of pets.

news.headline: RapidAI introduces Rapid Enterprise Platform and Navigator Pro at RSNA 2024, combining on-premise and cloud capabilities.
news.summary: A new advanced medical imaging analysis platform called Rapid Enterprise™ Platform has been introduced by RapidAI, a global leader in AI-driven healthcare technology. Featuring the Rapid Edge Cloud technology, this platform offers innovative tools such as Rapid Navigator Pro™ and third-party integration. Notably, the Rapid Enterprise platform sets a benchmark in clinical AI with its hybrid approach that combines on-premise and cloud-based capabilities. This launch signifies a significant advancement in cross-disciplinary AI within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Envision CU partners with NCR Atleos to enhance self-service banking with ATMaaS and ITMaaS solutions.
news.summary: NCR Atleos Corporation, trading as NATL, a prominent provider of self-service financial access solutions, declared that Envision Credit Union from Tallahassee, Fla. has enhanced its association with Atleos by opting for their ATM as a Service (ATMaaS) and ITM as a Service (ITMaaS) solution. This choice aims to enhance operational efficiency in the self-service banking sector. Envision CU, known for its community service, has expanded its cooperation with Atleos to optimize processes within the self-service banking channel.

news.headline: Skyflow introduces AI security layer for enterprises, including data protection & compliance measures. New ecosystem for agentic apps.
news.summary: Located in Palo Alto, California, Skyflow has introduced enhanced features for Agentic AI, providing enterprises with the ability to create and implement AI agents embedded with a security and privacy trust layer. These features encompass safeguarding sensitive data transiting through AI agents, as well as auditing, logging, and ensuring compliance with various global and regional data protection regulations. The company is at the forefront of establishing a new ecosystem for agentic apps, catering to the growing demand for secure and compliant AI solutions.

news.headline: Lynkwell partners with Recharge Alaska to improve EV charging in remote regions, overcoming obstacles with innovative solutions.
news.summary: Schenectady, New York - Lynkwell, a prominent energy infrastructure firm, has disclosed a collaboration with Recharge Alaska to enhance EV charging facilities in the sub-arctic region. This partnership aims to combat prevailing doubts regarding the dependability of electric vehicle service equipment (EVSE) in harsh conditions. Operating in Alaska's isolated and rigorous terrain, Lynkwell showcases the potential for advancements in EV charging to address and surmount these obstacles successfully. Through the development of a tailor-made white-label solution, this initiative is set to revolutionize the EV charging infrastructure.

news.headline: Creand Credit Andorra picks NICE Actimize to enhance AML strategy for global operations, with holdings in five countries.
news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- A leading business in intelligent solutions, NICE Actimize, a branch of NICE (NASDAQ: NICE), has recently been selected by Creand Crèdit Andorrà for enhancing and revamping its anti-money laundering (AML) approach. This will involve incorporating a sophisticated set of NICE Actimize’s financial crime solutions to align with global AML regulations more efficiently. Creand Crèdit Andorrà operates financial establishments across Andorrà, Luxembourg, Spain, Panama, and the United States. The collaboration with NICE Actimize is intended to bolster their AML strategies.
